rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE RICHARD L. STRATTON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/18/19 - Prob. C. Sec. 851 provides that: 1. a copy of the Petition be mailed with the notice and 2. the street address or description of location and APN be contained in the notice. The information attached as an exhibit is not sufficient. Please either file informed waivers of notice from all interested parties or request further continuance to allow time for 30 days' notice.
